DELETE FROM DB.DBA.RDF_RDF_REPL_GRAPH_DEL(SELECT ?g WHERE { GRAPH ?g { ?s ?p ?o } } LIMIT 1);
DELETE FROM DB.DBA.RDF_RDF_REPL_GRAPH_DEL((SELECT DISTINCT ?g WHERE { GRAPH ?g { ?s ?p ?o . FILTER(?s = <http://example.com/specific-subject>) }}));
DELETE FROM DB.DBA.RDF_RDF_REPL_GRAPH_DEL('http://example.org') WHERE EXISTS (SELECT ?g WHERE { GRAPH ?g { ?s ?p ?o } } LIMIT 1);
DELETE FROM DB.DBA.RDF_RDF_REPL_GRAPH_DEL('http://test.org') WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT ?g WHERE { GRAPH ?g { ?s ?p ?o } });
DELETE FROM DB.DBA.RDF_RDF_REPL_GRAPH_DEL((SELECT ?g WHERE { GRAPH ?g { ?s ?p ?o } } ORDER BY ?g DESC LIMIT 1));
